# ctyun_mysql_character_set (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10033813/10140487





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `inst_id` (String) MySQL实例ID

### Optional

- `project_id` (String) 项目ID
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，默认使用provider配置

### Read-Only

- `mysql_character_set` (Attributes List) MySQL支持的字符集列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--mysql_character_set))

<a id="nestedatt--mysql_character_set"></a>
### Nested Schema for `mysql_character_set`

Read-Only:

- `charset` (String) 字符集名称
- `default_collation` (String) 默认校对规则
- `description` (String) 字符集描述
- `max_len` (Number) 最大字节长度
